nodes.context: Canadian Tamil street gang originating in Toronto, active from early 1990s, involved in various criminal activities.
Tamil gang based out of Scarborough, rival of VVT.

edges.evidence_quote: In the mid 1990s to early 2000s, the VVT had an ongoing war with another Tamil gang called the AK Aannan based out of Scarborough.
edges.context: VVT and AK Aannan were engaged in a violent conflict (war) during the mid 1990s to early 2000s.

edges.evidence_quote: There was a brief truce in 1998 after community members brokered a peace deal in a Richmond Hill Hindu temple; however, a murder a year later renewed the fighting.
edges.context: VVT and AK Aannan had a brief truce in 1998, which ended after a murder in 1999.
